The resolution was adopted.


Mr.. Funk also introduced a resolu-
tion that the board of public works
prepare plans for a combination steel
trestie and fill to replace the old
wooden trestle on East Sprague ave-
nue.. Plans are also to be submitted
for new wooden trestle.


The new telephone ordinance, SUBJ
mitted by c. e. Summers, was pre-
sented and passed to the committee
of the whole without discussion.


The ordinance granting franchise
to the Washington Water Power COM
pany for street car tracks west Of the
Hangman creek bridge was passed.
